message:
chore(artifacts): refresh conformance/cve_arena/runtime_math/release snapshots

Regenerate the v1 conformance, cve_arena, runtime_math, and release
artifacts to reflect the latest harness run. 62 files, ins/del are
symmetric (1783/1783) — structure identical, values updated.

Categories of change:
- generated_at / generated_utc / trace_generated_at timestamps bumped
  (2026-04-25 → 2026-04-26 window)
- Performance counters (composite_ns_per_op_x1000, contention_score,
  duration_ns, ns_per_op_x1000, ebr/flat_combining/rcu/seqlock pass
  counts, ebr_epoch) drift inside expected variance
- cve_arena per-bead trace.jsonl + artifact_index.json refreshed for
  bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy, bd-24b6,
  bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd
- bd-1f35 hardened/strict create_join_churn / fanout_fanin_single /
  mixed_detach_join stderr artifacts refreshed
- bd-1qy hardened/strict mutex contention/destroy/roundtrip/unlock
  stderr artifacts refreshed
- Conformance v1 reports refreshed: alien_cs_e2e (report + trace),
  closure_sweep, cross_report_consistency, fuzz_harness_architecture,
  fuzz_membrane_validation, fuzz_phase1_targets, fuzz_phase2_targets,
  perf_regression_prevention, reverse_round_contracts, stub_census,
  symbol_tiers_roadmap, symbol_universe_normalization
- cve_arena v1 reports refreshed: corpus_normalization,
  format_string_validation, hardened_assertions, heap_overflow,
  integer_overflow, paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation
- release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json refreshed
- runtime_math: admission_gate, controller_ablation, controller_manifest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
